title: Improving Negotiation
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable customer-facing workshop for improving negotiation performance.
whyThisMatters: Improving Negotiation helps sales, marketing, and service teams improve negotiation through clearer conversations, stronger follow-through, and more consistent customer handling. Participants practise Understand basic bargaining techniques, Use the negotiating process to solve everyday problems, and Skills for Successful Negotiating so they can apply the skills in real customer situations.
builtFor: Employees who manage customer conversations or expectations
walkAwayWith: Use clearer service or sales behaviors in everyday interactions.
Respond to difficult moments with more structure and confidence.
Align practical standards across the team.

modules.title: Use the negotiating process to solve everyday problems

methodologyCaption: Participants practise workplace conversations and customer-facing scenarios through role-play, feedback, and group reflection.
